content:
# Recommendations — after iter-039

## Headline state
- **Seed-1 CLOSED.** `pushforward_lax_mu_comparison_lhs_tmul` is sorry-free; `pullbackTensorIsoOfLocallyTrivial` (seed-1) sorry-free. Verified by review: `lake build` EXIT 0 (8324-job whole tree), axiom-clean.
- **Project-wide sorry: 1.** The SOLE remaining leaf is Route B `trivialisation_restrict_compat` (`TensorObjInverse.lean:183`/body ~244).

## 1. PRIORITIZE — Route B `trivialisation_restrict_compat` (iter-040 even-slot, de-risked)
The whole project now bottlenecks on this one lemma. It is already de-risked:
- The keystone iso the iter-038 prover reported absent EXISTS: Mathlib `AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules.restrictFunctorComp j f` (`Mathlib.AlgebraicGeometry.Modules.Sheaf`; OUTER `j`/INNER `f`) = NatIso `M.restrict (j≫f) ≅ (M.restrict f).restrict j`.
- The 5 restriction-naturality squares come FREE via `.hom.naturality`/`.inv.naturality φ` (NO `_hom_app` simp; unfold via `.hom.naturality` + `Functor.comp_map`). Re-search the API via `Scheme.Modules.restrictFunctor (?f ≫ ?g)`, NOT object-level `SheafOfModules.restrict`.
- Recipe in `analogies/restrictcomp039.md`. Frontier (`archon dag-query frontier`) lists the 8 ready square-lemmas: `tensorobj_restrict_iso_restrict_compat`, `dual_restrict_iso_dualisoofiso_restrict_compat`, `dual_unit_iso_restrict_compat`, `tensorobj_unit_iso_restrict_compat`, `trivialisation_uiota_restrict_compat`, etc.
- DEAD probes (do NOT retry): subst/rcases on `hVU:V≤U` (not an eqn), `simp[restrictIsoUnitOfLE]`, `congr 1`/`Iso.eq_inv_comp`/`Hom.ext`.
- Root stays frozen → race-free. This closes the project's last sorry (modulo seed-3 scaffold).

## 2. DETERMINISTIC FIX — 6 stale `.lean` header/doc comments (refactor-route, plan phase)
lean-auditor (0 must-fix) flagged 6 MAJOR stale comments in `TensorObjSubstrate.lean`, all now FALSE (they describe `lhs_tmul` / other closed sorries as open). Review cannot edit `.lean`. Dispatch the **refactor** subagent in the plan phase to update:
- L46–50: module header marks `lhs_tmul` "(seed-1, active) SOLE in-file sorry" → now closed.
- L70–72: calls `pullbackValIso_comp_leg` "the SOLE remaining sorry" (closed iter-019).
- L163: `pullbackTensorIsoOfLocallyTrivial` described as "gated" on the closed residual.
- L3541: "Typed sorry retained" — no sorry in `pullbackTensorMap_restrict`.
- L3996/4054: D4′ note still shows `IsIso := sorry` as the chosen structure.
- L4353: lemma docstring closes "remains the sole open residual".
Report: `task_results/lean-auditor-iter039.md`. (Deterministic → refactor subagent, NOT a prover lane.)

## 3. BLUEPRINT PRECISION — `Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex` (blueprint-writer, non-blocking)
lvb-checker PASS but 4 minor prose gaps on the now-closed `lem:pushforward_lax_mu_comparison_lhs_tmul`:
- Record that the closing uses **`Subsingleton.elim` on the `Opens Y` poset + `P.map_comp`/`congr_hom` term route**, not the literal "adjunction triangle identity read on opens" (cheaper argument; math consistent).
- The unit leg is the **geometric opens-adjunction counit**, not the module-level `hadj'.counit` — fix the displayed symbol (the `\lean{}` ref is already correct).
- Minor statement-framing + a stale forward-pointer.
Report: `task_results/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-substrate039.md`. Non-blocking (proof already landed); do in the iter-040 plan phase.

## 4. Coverage debt (deferred, unchanged)
- `archon dag-query unmatched` = **106** `lean_aux` decls with no blueprint entry (bulk pre-existing). No NEW debt this iter — the prover added no top-level declarations (the one abstract δ helper was added then removed). `restrictScalars_δ_app_tmul` / `pushforwardPushforwardAdj_counit_app_app_apply` (iter-037) are already blueprinted. Defer the bulk sweep to the post-seed-lanes phase.

## 5. Reusable proof patterns (also in PROJECT_STATUS Knowledge Base)
- `respectTransparency false` + direct `erw [single_factor_helper …]` defeq-matches a composite δ/μ/counit — manual identity-factor peeling (`comp_δ`+`map_id`) silently fails in the carrier diamond.
- Fvar-keyed value `have` over a heavy composite: pin ALL explicit args (`N`,`U`,`y`) + `maxHeartbeats 1600000`, else `erw` whnf-explodes.
- `Subsingleton.elim` on a poset-of-opens collapses an adjunction-triangle `co ≫ uo = 𝟙` cheaply.
- Abstract-`P` `have` + `ConcreteCategory.congr_hom (P.map_comp …)` forms a `ModuleCat` `≫` indirectly where the manual `≫` won't typecheck through a defeq-not-syntactic intermediate.

## Do NOT
- Re-attempt the abstract `{C D : Type*}` value-helper model for the K1 mate seam (closed now; was the iter-035 dead-end, value irreducibly PresheafOfModules-specific).
- Re-open Route A: it is DONE. No prover lane on `TensorObjSubstrate.lean` until the file-split / coverage phase.
